category_sources: source_facts.description says buffrs is for modern protobuf package management.
source_facts.homepage and source_facts.repo point to the official helsing-ai/buffrs repository.
docs_sources: source_facts.homepage is the official GitHub repository; README is the best available official documentation surface in the supplied facts.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo is already populated with https://github.com/helsing-ai/buffrs, so repo is returned as null per instruction.
tags_sources: source_facts.repo path identifies the official GitHub project used for provenance.
